title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Speed Post India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Speed Post India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Speed Post India! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Speed Post India:
Speed Post India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speed Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
